cn: 一位年轻的摄影师在东京街头捕捉夜景，新宿区的霓虹灯映照在她的眼镜上，单反相机挂在胸前，右手调整镜头参数，身穿黑色连帽衫和深蓝色牛仔裤，背着黑色摄影包，专注于寻找最佳拍摄角度，周围是熙熙攘攘的人群和闪烁的商店招牌，街道湿漉漉反射着霓虹光芒，使用 Sony A7RIV、50mm f/1.4 GM 镜头拍摄（ISO 800、1/125s），人物位于画面右侧三分之一处，占据画面40%面积，镜头从广角环境缓慢推近至人物特写，相机自动对焦环精确旋转，快门轻微按下声，周围路人虚化形成光斑，远处建筑物的LED屏幕显示动态广告，空气中弥漫着雨后清新的气息，整体氛围都市而专业
en: A young photographer capturing night scenes in Tokyo streets neon lights of Shinjuku reflecting on her glasses DSLR camera hanging in front adjusting lens parameters with right hand wearing black hoodie dark blue jeans carrying black camera bag focused on finding best shooting angle surrounded by bustling crowds and flickering shop signs wet street reflecting neon glow shot with Sony A7RIV 50mm f/1.4 GM lens ISO 800 1/125s figure positioned on right third of frame occupying 40% area lens slowly pushes from wide environmental shot to close-up camera auto-focus ring precisely rotates shutter gently clicks surrounding pedestrians blurred into light spots distant building LED screens show dynamic ads fresh post-rain air fills atmosphere urban and professional
cn-tag: 摄影师,东京夜景,街头摄影,新宿,霓虹灯,单反相机,黑色连帽衫,专注,都市,专业,Sony相机,50mm镜头,雨夜,都市氛围
en-tag: photographer,Tokyo night,street photography,Shinjuku,neon lights,DSLR camera,black hoodie,focused,urban,professional,Sony camera,50mm lens,rainy night,city atmosphere
